[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10011111 6
1 10110000 3
2 00100111 4
3 00010111 4
4 00011110 4
5 11100111 6
6 10001100 3
7 10111000 4

01 10 10100111 5
12 21 00001001 2
23 32 11111001 6
34 43 01101011 5
45 54 00110100 3
56 65 10011111 6 match 0
67 76 10110000 3 match 1
70 07 00100111 4 match 2

02 20 10101110 5
13 31 11110000 4
24 42 10010010 3
35 53 01011111 6
46 64 10101011 5

60 06 10010111 5
71 17 10000000 1

47 74 00011011 4

72 27 10001001 3
